message:
Invalid `prisma.user.count()` invocation:

{
  select: {
    _count: {
      select: {
        _all: true
      }
    }
  },
  where: {
    status: "ACTIVE",
    ~~~~~~
    role: "EMPLOYEE",
?   AND?: UserWhereInput | UserWhereInput[],
?   OR?: UserWhereInput[],
?   NOT?: UserWhereInput | UserWhereInput[],
?   id?: StringFilter | String,
?   email?: StringFilter | String,
?   password?: StringFilter | String,
?   name?: StringFilter | String,
?   employeeCode?: StringFilter | String,
?   phone?: StringNullableFilter | String | Null,
?   bio?: StringNullableFilter | String | Null,
?   profileImage?: StringNullableFilter | String | Null,
?   departmentId?: StringNullableFilter | String | Null,
?   shift?: StringFilter | String,
?   monthlySalary?: FloatFilter | Float,
?   emailVerified?: BoolFilter | Boolean,
?   otp?: StringNullableFilter | String | Null,
?   otpExpires?: DateTimeNullableFilter | DateTime | Null,
?   needsPasswordChange?: BoolFilter | Boolean,
?   createdAt?: DateTimeFilter | DateTime,
?   updatedAt?: DateTimeFilter | DateTime,
?   attendances?: AttendanceListRelationFilter,
?   auditLogs?: AuditLogListRelationFilter,
?   biometricAttendances?: BiometricAttendanceListRelationFilter,
?   DailyTask?: DailyTaskListRelationFilter,
?   managedDepartment?: DepartmentNullableScalarRelationFilter | DepartmentWhereInput | Null,
?   emailLogs?: EmailLogListRelationFilter,
?   leaveBalances?: LeaveBalanceListRelationFilter,
?   leaveRequests?: LeaveRequestListRelationFilter,
?   notifications?: NotificationListRelationFilter,
?   refreshTokens?: RefreshTokenListRelationFilter,
?   TaskSubmission?: TaskSubmissionListRelationFilter,
?   department?: DepartmentNullableScalarRelationFilter | DepartmentWhereInput | Null,
?   wfhRequests?: WfhRequestListRelationFilter
  }
}

Unknown argument `status`. Available options are marked with ?.
